assessment: The LM Studio local agent support is fully implemented and matches the plan scope. Shared types and agent-config schema include lmstudio and optional baseUrl with validation; AgentClient routes invoke and spawnWithTaskFile to LM Studio via the OpenAI-compatible client; GET /models supports provider=lmstudio and baseUrl with 502 and user-facing errors when unreachable; API key resolution correctly excludes lmstudio; and the frontend exposes LM Studio in all agent-type surfaces (AgentsStep, SimplifiedAgentsStep, ProjectSettingsModal, CreateNewProjectPage) with Base URL and ModelSelect. Unit and integration tests cover the critical paths and error messages; no gaps or deviations warrant follow-up tasks.
